security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://tauri.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:5173 ws://localhost:5173 http://localhost:1420; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://tauri.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'

bundle.longDescription: Local-first desktop interpretability tool for small transformer LLMs.

updater._comment: active=false for v1: Tauri 2 updater requires a signed pubkey. When signing lands post-v1, set active=true and populate pubkey.
